sql_array: CREATE TABLE locations (id INT, geom POINT);
INSERT INTO locations (id, geom) VALUES (1, st_point(0, 52));
INSERT INTO locations (id, geom) VALUES (2, st_point(0, 70));
SELECT st_distance(geom, st_point(0, 70)) FROM locations WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE locations SET geom = st_point(1, 60) WHERE id = 1;
